features: Unique Febreze Odourclear technology doesn't just mask but truly fights odours, leaving a fresh scent
Febreze Spray Air Freshener, non-flammable, natural propellant and perfect for any room in the house
It fights tough lingering pet odours and leaves a light fresh scent
Leaves your home with a beautiful light, fresh scent
description: Product Description Febreze Air Freshener with Odourclear technology fights tough lingering odours, leaving a light fresh scent. With 2x the normal odour fighting ingredients, our toughest air freshener with OdourClear technology doesn’t just mask odours, it truly fights them leaving a beautiful fresh scent. Whether you have persistent pet pongs, tough tobacco smells, or other household whiffs that just won’t leave, there’s a Febreze Heavy Duty air freshener for you. Febreze Aerosols are non-flammable and contain 100Percent natural propellant. This makes them a perfect fit for any room in the house. Try the full range of Febreze products with the unique Odourclear technology, such as Febreze Fabric Refresher and Car Freshener. Also try 3volution Plugs, to continuously fight odours and freshen for up to 90 days Ingredients Water, Alcohol Denat, PEG-60 Hydrogenated Caster Oil, Fragances, Sodium Citrate, Hydroxypropyl clycodextrin, Benzisothiazolinone, Nitrogen Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more
